feed.title: COVERED — Updates
feed.subtitle: Free period products, paid for by advertising. Building in the open from Exeter, UK.

entry.title: Exeter pilot: recruiting venues and founding advertising partners
entry.summary: COVERED is recruiting Exeter venues for a 6–8 week zero-cost pilot of its free period product dispensers, and founding advertising partners for the ad-funded model. Venues provide wall space and a plug socket; COVERED handles installation, restocking, maintenance and monthly impact reporting.

entry.title: COVERED launches: free period products, paid for by advertising
entry.summary: COVERED is a UK social enterprise installing smart wall-mounted dispensers that give out free, plastic-free period products, funded entirely by brands advertising on the dispensers' 32-inch screens. More than 1 in 10 UK women and people who menstruate struggled to afford period products in the last year (ActionAid UK).
